---
title: "CP Plot"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{CP Plot}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
library(causalcp)

set.seed(1)
n <- 300
df <- data.frame(x = rnorm(n))
df$z <- rbinom(n, 1, plogis(df$x))
df$ehat <- plogis(df$x)
df$tau_hat <- 1 + df$x

fit <- cp_plot(df, ehat = "ehat", tau_hat = "tau_hat", treat = "z")
fit$plot
fit$slopes
```
